title: callitriche verna var. leptophylla
intro: Callitriche verna var. leptophylla, also known as lesser pondweed, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing swelling and pain, and it has also been used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Callitriche verna var. leptophylla include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas or applied topically to affected areas.
